requirements.how: Sign up at lob.com — no credit card required for test mode
lob.com → Dashboard → Settings → API Keys → copy test_... key

requirements.description: LOB_LIVE_API_KEY (optional — only needed for real sends)
requirements.how: Same location — copy live_... key. Only required when LOB_LIVE_MODE=true

steps.title: Wire lob-mcp into Claude Code
steps.command: claude mcp add lob --env LOB_TEST_API_KEY=test_... --env LOB_LIVE_MODE=false --env LOB_MAX_PIECES_PER_RUN=10 -- npx -y lob-mcp
steps.note: Key set by user — restart required to load server

steps.title: Test full flow: address validation, letter preview+commit, postcard preview+commit
steps.note: Verified 2026-06-06 — all 5 steps pass in test mode. Key gotcha: use_type is required on every piece ('operational' for letters, 'marketing' for postcards); commit payload must exactly match preview payload for token acceptance in live mode.

requirements.description: One-time browser login per MCP process to get token + userId
requirements.how: formation_login opens browser; copy token (eyJ...) and userId (user_...) from dashboard; call formation_set_token with both

requirements.description: lovie-formation MCP server in Claude Code at user scope
requirements.how: claude mcp add --scope user lovie-formation npx @lovie-ai/formation-mcp-server@latest

steps.title: Wire lovie-formation MCP into Claude Code at user scope
steps.command: claude mcp add --scope user lovie-formation npx @lovie-ai/formation-mcp-server@latest

steps.title: Discover exact tool schemas via static analysis of MCP source
steps.output: docs/tool-schemas.md — 24 tools with full field schemas and response shapes
steps.note: Live testing skipped (browser auth not viable on headless Mac Mini). Key gotchas discovered: formation_set_token requires both token AND userId; formation_check_name takes sessionId only (not a name string); formation_describe_business is a required step before formation_set_state; formation_set_company_address is required; auth is in-memory per MCP process; certificate URL expires in 60 minutes.

phases.name: Next Integration (TBD)
phases.note: Use standard 8-step process from CLAUDE.md when starting any new power

steps.title: Choose next wizard power to build
Find MCP server, read README, list exact tool names
Add MCP server, restart, verify connected
Write atomic test plan with pass/fail criteria before touching skill
Execute all tests — validate, preview, commit → status:processed
Write skill using verified tool names and required fields only
Copy skill to claude-config, commit both repos
Verify all 5 completion criteria from CLAUDE.md checklist
